mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ht_scope_dtu (id, tasks_id, org_id, company_id, meter_arc_code, dtu_num, chan_nums, concentrator_code, status, create_time, create_by) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.tasksId}, #{item.orgId}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.meterArcCode}, #{item.dtuNum}, #{item.chanNums}, #{item.concentratorCode}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.createBy})
